nasb.text: Now when these things have been so prepared, the priests are continually entering the outer tabernacle performing the divine worship,

esv.text: These preparations having thus been made, the priests go regularly into the first section, performing their ritual duties,

cnv.text: 這一切物件都這樣預備好了，祭司就常常進入第一進會幕，執行敬拜的事。

ccb.text: 这些东西都齐备了，祭司们便经常进入圣所，举行敬拜。

csbs.text: 既然这些东西都这样预备好了，祭司们就常常进入第一间会幕行事奉礼。
